title: My Word Against Mine (EADF2026)
synopsis:
One in ten people hear voices. This documentary follows five individuals living with this phenomenon, ranging from a single protective voice to nineteen hostile ones. Within a therapeutic setting, a psychiatrist guides them in conversations directly with their internal companions. As hidden traumas surface, this revolutionary approach fosters deeper insight and acceptance. The film crafts a fascinating group portrait of these characters and their voices, reflecting the wonderful world of the human mind.

 

Best Dutch Film Award, IDFA
International Competition Award for Best Film, One World Human Rights Film Festival

synopsis_lang.en:
One in ten people hear voices. This documentary follows five individuals living with this phenomenon, ranging from a single protective voice to nineteen hostile ones. Within a therapeutic setting, a psychiatrist guides them in conversations directly with their internal companions. As hidden traumas surface, this revolutionary approach fosters deeper insight and acceptance. The film crafts a fascinating group portrait of these characters and their voices, reflecting the wonderful world of the human mind.

 

Best Dutch Film Award, IDFA
International Competition Award for Best Film, One World Human Rights Film Festival
synopsis_lang.zh_hk:
每十個人就有一個聽見腦內的另一把聲音。當那些或殘忍、或溫柔的聲音藏在腦海深處，你會選擇用藥物抹殺它，還是坐下來與它對話？本片記錄了五位與幻聽共存的受訪者，在精神科醫生的引導下，直面內在聲音的反撲與貶低，大膽與這些神祕夥伴對話。隨着隱藏的創傷逐一浮現，這場顛覆傳統的心理治療，為他們開啟了理解與接納自我的大門，拆解社會對幻聽的既定想像，翻轉聽見聲音即是患病的標籤，將其視為人類經驗的另一種變異。

 

阿姆斯特丹國際紀錄片電影節 最佳荷蘭電影獎
捷克One World人權電影節 國際競賽最佳電影獎

subtitle: English
